data.name: OnlyIfDifferentFromAudioCheckBox
data.value: 仅选取与音频不同的语言
data.comment: Label for checkbox on subtitle picker. When checked, it will only include the subtitle if it's a different language from the chosen audio track.

data.name: PickerButtonFormat
data.comment: {0} is the name of the picker. This string shows up on the picker split button.

data.name: PickerHelpText
data.value: 自动提取标题、 音频、 字幕和区域

data.name: UseGlobalSettingToolTip
data.comment: Label for the "indeterminate" checkbox state that lets the user know that this will fall back to the global setting

data.name: PresetOverrideToolTip
data.value: 这将取代主窗口中选择的预设。

data.name: EncodingSection
data.comment: The header for the Encoding section in the Picker window.

data.name: PostEncodingSection
data.comment: Header for the post-encoding section in the picker window.

data.name: SendFileToLabel
data.comment: Label for the option to run a program after encoding each file.

data.name: PostEncodeArgumentsLabel
data.comment: The label for the arguments to pass to the post-encode executable.

data.name: PostEncodeArgumentsToolTip
data.value: 传递给程序的参数。使用 {file} 表示文件输出路径，使用 {folder} 表示包含文件夹路径，使用 {sourcepath} 表示完整源路径，或者使用其他路径选项，例如 {title} 和 {date}（请参阅命名格式）。
data.comment: Tool tip for the post-encode arguments UI. Do not translate {file} .

data.name: PresetDisabledForPickerToolTip
data.value: 选择器已指定编码预设。

data.name: SingleSubtitleDefaultToolTip
data.value: 标记该字幕轨道为默认，播放视频时就自动显示。

data.name: MultipleSubtitleDefaultToolTip
data.value: 标记第一条字幕轨道为默认，播放视频时将自动显示。

data.name: FirstAsDefaultCheckBox
data.comment: Label for checkbox to mark the first subtitle as default.

data.name: ForcedOnlyCheckBox
data.comment: Label for checkbox in Picker window to choose only Forced subtitles of the chosen subtitle track.

data.name: DurationFilterStartAutomationName
data.value: 持续筛选器起始时间（分）
data.comment: Screen reader text for number box that represents the start of the filter range in minutes. The number chosen in this box represents the minimum title length in minutes that will be chosen.

data.name: DurationFilterEndAutomationName
data.value: 持续筛选器结束时间（分钟）
data.comment: Screen reader text for number box that represents the end of the filter range in minutes. The number chosen in this box represents the maximum title length in minutes that will be chosen.

data.name: DurationFilterCheckBoxAutomationName
data.comment: Name for screen readers for the checkbox to filter titles by a given duration range.

data.name: ByIndexRadioButton
data.comment: Label for the choice to choose audio or subtitle tracks by index

data.name: OutputFolder
data.comment: Label for the output folder.

data.name: UseCustomFileNameFormatCheckBox
data.value: 使用自定义文件命名格式：

data.name: WhenFileExistsBatch
data.value: 文件已存在时（批量处理）：

data.name: CustomPickerNameTemplate
data.comment: The name for a custom auto-created picker. {0} is a number like 2, or 3 or 4 to differentiate it

data.name: OutputFileNameFormatAutomationName
data.comment: Name for screen readers for the output file name format text box

data.name: OnlyChangeCapitalizationIfAllSameLabel
data.value: 仅当全部为小写或全部为大写时才更改大小写。

data.name: WordBreakCharacterAutomationNameFormat
data.comment: Screen reader format for word break checkboxes. These will determine if a character will be used to separate words.

data.name: AddAudioTrackNameButton
data.comment: Button to add another name to the list of audio track names in the Picker.

data.name: AddSubtitleTrackNameButton
data.comment: Button to add another name to the list of subtitle track names in the Picker.

data.name: CustomTrackNamesCheckBox
data.comment: Checkbox label to use custom audio or subtitle track names

data.name: TrackAutomationFormat
data.comment: Screen reader format for track names in the Picker.

data.name: PickerForeignAudioCheckBox
data.value: 添加“外语音频扫描”音轨

data.name: TrackSelectionLabel
data.comment: Label for track selection mode for audio or subtitle tracks.

data.name: AudioSelectionModeToolTip
data.value: 上次选择 - 如果找到匹配项，则选择上次选择的音轨；否则选择第一个音轨。 第一个 - 仅包含第一个音轨。 按索引 - 按音轨索引（从 1 开始）选择。 语言 - 按语言选择。 全部 - 包含所有音轨。

data.name: SubtitleSelectionModeToolTip
data.value: 上次选择 - 如果找到匹配项，则选择上次选择的字幕轨道；否则，不选择任何轨道。 无 - 不包含任何字幕。 第一个 - 仅包含第一个字幕。 按索引 - 按轨道索引（从 1 开始）选择。 语言 - 按语言选择。 全部 - 包含所有字幕。

data.name: IgnoreFilesBelowCheckBox
data.comment: A number box follows this string: Ignore files below [ 10 ] MB

data.name: PassThroughMetadataCheckBox
data.value: 传递视频元数据（导演、发行日期、演员等）

data.name: ExternalSubtitleImportCheckBox
data.value: 添加与输入视频文件相同的外部字幕文件 ({0})

data.name: SourceFileRemovalLabel
data.value: 成功编码后删除源文件：
data.comment: Label for the option to automatically delete source files on completion.

data.name: HeightFilterCheckBox
data.comment: Label before the UI to pick the title height limitation. For example, it might read "Pick only titles with height [ > ] [ 480 ]"

data.name: HeightFilterCheckBoxAutomationName
data.comment: Screen reader text for the height filter checkbox

data.name: HeightFilterValueAutomationName
data.comment: Screen reader text for the height filter value

data.name: WidthFilterCheckBox
data.value: 仅选择宽度合适的标题
data.comment: Label before the UI to pick the title width limitation. For example, it might read "Pick only titles with width [ > ] [ 640 ]"

data.name: WidthFilterCheckBoxAutomationName
data.comment: Screen reader text for the width filter checkbox

data.name: WidthFilterValueAutomationName
data.comment: Screen reader text for the width filter value

data.name: ExternalSubtitleImportToolTip
data.value: 还可以识别 fileName.lng.ext，其中 lng 是 ISO 语言名称，ext 是字幕文件扩展名。

data.name: FallbackLanguageLabel
data.comment: Label for an option of what language to mark a subtitle track as when it doesn't have the language identified in the file name. For example, if you have myVideo.mp4 and myVideo.srt, what language should we mark that as when we pick it up?

data.name: FallbackLanguageToolTip
data.value: 如果字幕文件名中没有明确标明语言，例如 myVideo.srt，则假定字幕语言为该语言。
